profile.role_zh: 食品科学大二·美食博主
profile.innate_zh: 味觉灵敏、创意丰富、表达欲强
profile.learned_zh: 运营美食账号积累的摄影和文案能力
profile.learned_en: Photography and copy from running food account
profile.belief_zh: 食物是最接地气的幸福
profile.belief_en: Food is the most down-to-earth happiness
profile.goal_zh: 毕业后做食品研发+美食自媒体
profile.goal_en: Food R&D + food blogging after graduation
profile.contradiction_zh: 学术化的食品科学 vs 自己更想做好吃的
profile.contradiction_en: Academic food-sci vs. she just wants to cook tasty things
profile.surface_zh: 热情爱笑、到哪都带吃的
profile.deep_zh: 用美食掩盖偶尔的孤独
profile.fear_zh: 做了一辈子不好吃的实验品
profile.fear_en: A life of making bad experimental dishes
profile.desire_en: Making food that makes people happy
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午上课，下午做实验美食，晚上拍照写文案
profile.rhythm_en: Class AM, lab-cooking PM, photos & posts at night
profile.spaces_zh: 食品实验室、食堂、校园各餐厅、宿舍
profile.spaces_en: Food lab, canteen, various campus cafeterias, dorm
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天拍一组实验室做的分子料理
profile.short_goal_en: Shoot a batch of molecular-gastronomy experiments
profile.constraint_zh: 实验室不允许随便做食物；拍照占用了太多时间
profile.constraint_en: Lab forbids casual cooking; photos eat too much time
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把所有东西都想成能不能吃
profile.bias_en: Thinks about whether everything is edible
profile.narrative_zh: 世界上没有什么事是一顿好吃的解决不了的
profile.narrative_en: No problem can't be solved with a good meal
